Title: The Tinder Swindler
Actors: Cecilie Fjellhøy, Simon Leviev, Natalie Remøe Hansen
Plot: Posing as a wealthy, jet-setting diamond mogul, he wooed women online, then conned them out of millions of dollars. Now some victims plan for payback.
Awards: Nominated for 5 Primetime Emmys. 3 wins & 14 nominations total
